angle_used: Pain: range / consistency across spec types
subject: Painting sub for multifamily + commercial
body:
Hi Todd,

LD's mix — 193 commercial, 137 residential, multifamily portfolios like Amber Gates, Innsbruck Village, Ivy Trails — covers spec types most painting subs drift across. PM ends up chasing crews on one job while another goes dark.

Ashrah Painting doesn't drift. Lumia auto-reports per site plus answers PM questions on demand. Six-day delay forecasting. Pro cleaning at handoff with no surface damage.

Worth 15 minutes?
signals_used: LD = 45+ yrs, 193 commercial + 137 residential projects, Amber Gates, Innsbruck Village, Ivy Trails, founded by Larry Dyck.
